commands.hypothesis: KILLED 2026-06-23 (operator). Fat-tail-wallet allowlist cohort copy-fatwallet-{tp100,follow,runner,hightp,scaleout} following 9LxM/2o9U/5hYs (WR<60, profitable via a fat right tail). After ~20 trades each, ALL 5 exit variants failed the bar: drop_top3 negative (-1.0 to -2.0), WR 9-19%, no exit style (follow / runner-trail / TP300 / scale-out vs TP100 control) recovered an edge. Root cause: their fat-tail winners live mostly in BONDING-CURVE entries we cannot copy; the copyable post-grad PumpSwap slice is just the drift. Lesson recorded: rank copy targets by post-grad Swap% + drop3, not raw WR/net.

KILLED 2026-06-23 (operator). Idealized 1:1 follow baseline (enter on lead buy, exit on lead sell, no entry delay). n=2210 but drop_top3 -25.3 and exit_stress -36.1 — the net is entirely tail/optimistic-fill driven and collapses under cost/robustness checks. Fails drop3 + stress.

KILLED 2026-06-23 (operator). Fat-tail hold variants copy-hold30m (n=1919, net +15.6 but drop_top3 -13.9) and copy-hold2h. Strong raw net but drop_top3 deeply negative = lottery (a few moonshot holds carry the whole P&L), not a robust edge. Fails the bar.
